description: Next-pass layer ON TOP of the C5 ai-user-feedback-loop on-device reinforcement cycle (PR #572 in flight). D1 is research-heavy (5-7d est) and cross-platform — it spans iOS (consumes RecommendationMemory + extends AIOrchestrator), backend (cohort-level adoption signal aggregation OR privacy-preserving federated learning), and product surface (transparency UX: 'why did the AI suppress this?'). Phase 0 enumerates the candidate sub-features, the privacy/aggregation tradeoffs, the dependency on D1.a vs D1.b vs D1.c branch decisions, and the Phase 1 prerequisites BEFORE PRD-level commitment.
backlog_source: docs/product/backlog.md Planned RICE row 4.5 + 2026-05-31 tier carryover plan D1

dependencies_met.C5_ai_user_feedback_loop: in flight 2026-06-01 PR #572 — provides RecommendationMemory env-object + AIOrchestrator reinforcement-loop block + 3 new home_ai_feedback_* analytics events. D1 builds on top, NOT around.
dependencies_met.HADF_Phase_2_clustering: shipped 2026-05-01 → k=5 clusters, silhouette 0.5566; cohort-level fingerprinting infra in place

dependencies_gated_on.C5_reaches_implementation_complete: PR #572 must merge OR reach phases.implementation.ended_at before D1 PRD authoring (D1 references C5's APIs)
dependencies_gated_on.Phase_E_exits: v7.9 Phase E exits ~2026-06-04. D1 PRD authoring CAN start in Phase E (no new gates yet), but ENFORCEMENT of any new D1 gates waits until v7.9.1 build window opens.

open_decisions_at_phase_0.D1.a: Pure on-device extension: time-decay weighting on RecommendationMemory + lightweight per-user trend detection (signal acceptance trending up over 60d). Zero server-side. Privacy-preserving by construction.
open_decisions_at_phase_0.D1.b: Cohort-level adoption signal: anonymous aggregated counts of fraction of users who accept signal X shared via the existing cohort backend. Federated avg, k>=20 minimum cohort, no per-user data leaves device. Requires backend extension.
open_decisions_at_phase_0.D1.c: AI-suggested replacement: when a signal is suppressed, surface an alternative (e.g. dismissed protein_below -> try meal_timing_late instead). Requires LLM call OR pre-computed mapping table.
open_decisions_at_phase_0.D1.d: Suppression transparency UX: Why was this recommendation suppressed? affordance in Settings -> AI Feedback. Opens explanation showing the 3 dismissals + their dates + reasons.
open_decisions_at_phase_0.Phase_0_decision_required: Pick 2 of D1.a/b/c/d for Phase 1 PRD. Phase 0 enumerates tradeoffs but does NOT pre-commit. Recommendation: D1.a + D1.d (100% on-device, ~3.5 person-days).

transitions.reason: D1 from 2026-05-31 tier carryover plan (RICE 4.5, research-heavy 5-7d, pairs with C5). Operator directive: 'continue c3,c6,e4,d1 in sequence'. Phase 0 research draft only — D1 has 4 open candidate sub-features requiring decision before PRD authoring.
